plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Sofia - The Funny Fully Voiced Follower - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/2180
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Sofia - The Funny Fully Voiced Follower - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/2180
Prohibit Sofia to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Sofia's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Sofia as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Sofia - The Funny Fully Voiced Follower - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/2180
Sofia will be: poverty (she litteraly sleeps in stables, and just wondering around), warrior, proud
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\SofiaFunnyFollowerTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires M'rissi's Tails of Troubles SE - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/9666
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires M'rissi's Tails of Troubles SE - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/9666
Prohibit M'rissi to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use M'rissi's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register M'rissi as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires M'rissi's Tails of Troubles SE - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/9666
M'rissi will be: working, ranger, romantic
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\MrissiTailsOfTroublesTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Vilja in Skyrim - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/6722
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Vilja in Skyrim - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/6722
Prohibit Vilja to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Vilja's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Vilja as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Vilja in Skyrim - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/6722
Vilja will be: working, craftsman, romantic
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\ViljaInSkyrimTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Remiel-Custom Voiced Dwemer Specialist and Companion - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/51874
Prohibit Remiel to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Remiel's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Remiel as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Remiel-Custom Voiced Dwemer Specialist and Companion - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/51874
Remiel will be: working, craftsman, independent
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\RemielDwemerSpecialistTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Heart of Ice - Astrid. Custom Voiced Follower - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/132350
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Heart of Ice - Astrid. Custom Voiced Follower - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/132350
Prohibit Astrid to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Astrid's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Astrid as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Heart of Ice - Astrid. Custom Voiced Follower - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/132350
Astrid will be: working, warrior, proud
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\AstridHeartOfIceTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Neiva Deep Water - The prisoner of the tides - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/112162
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Neiva Deep Water - The prisoner of the tides - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/112162
Prohibit Neiva to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Neiva's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Neiva as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Neiva Deep Water - The prisoner of the tides - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/112162
Neiva will be: middle, mage, independent
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\NeivaDeepWaterTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Lyssia (fully voiced follower and quest) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/92898
Prohibit Lyssia to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Lyssia's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Lyssia as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Lyssia (fully voiced follower and quest) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/92898
Lyssia will be: middle, mage, proud
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\LyssiaTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Death Consumes All - DLC Quest Mod (Revamped) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/138716
Prohibit Livia to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Livia's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Livia as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Death Consumes All - DLC Quest Mod (Revamped) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/138716
Livia will be: noble, warrior, proud
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\LiviaTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Kaidan 2 (AIO + Immersive Features) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/19075 https://kaidanmod.com/all-in-one-installer/
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Kaidan 2 (AIO + Immersive Features) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/19075 https://kaidanmod.com/all-in-one-installer/
Prohibit Kaidan to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Kaidan's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Kaidan as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Kaidan 2 (AIO + Immersive Features) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/19075 https://kaidanmod.com/all-in-one-installer/
Kaidan will be: working, warrior, independent
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\KaidanTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Kaidan Revoiced - Community Expansion (KRCE) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/135345
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Kaidan Revoiced - Community Expansion (KRCE) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/135345
Prohibit Kaidan to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Kaidan's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Kaidan as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Kaidan Revoiced - Community Expansion (KRCE) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/135345
Kaidan will be: working, warrior, independent
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\KaidanTypesOverride.json

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration
plugin.description:
Requires Val Serano - Pirate Follower and Quest Adventure - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/103669
Adds integration with follower's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when follower is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Val Serano - Pirate Follower and Quest Adventure - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/103669
Prohibit Val Serano to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Val Serano's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Val Serano as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Override personality
plugin.description:
Requires Val Serano - Pirate Follower and Quest Adventure - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/103669
Val Serano will be: working, warrior, independent
This values can be modified later in json file - SKSE\Plugins\MARAS\spousesTypes\ValSeranoTypesOverride.json

installStep.name: Vanilla NPCs with Custom Marriage Quests

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration SDA
plugin.description:
Requires Serana Dialogue Add-On - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/32161
Adds integration with NPC's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when NPC is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Marriage Quest Integration SDE
plugin.description:
Requires Serana Dialogue Expansion(with optional file for romance) - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/121920
Adds integration with NPC's custom marriage quest.
When custom marriage quest reaches stage when NPC is considered player's spouse it will register within MARAS mod.

plugin.name: Use custom marriage quest only
plugin.description:
Requires Serana Dialogue Add-On - https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrimspecialedition/mods/32161
Prohibit Serana to accept Player's proposal via M.A.R.A.S
Instead it will use Serana's custom romance/marriage quest, and M.A.R.A.S will register Serana as spouse when quest reached married stage.

plugin.name: Harkon
plugin.description: Social class - rulers

plugin.name: Serana
plugin.description: Social class - rulers

plugin.name: Valerica
plugin.description: Social class - rulers
